name: eval datasets: each skills/<skill>/SKILL.md that is in a review loop has a matching evals/datasets/skills/<skill>.jsonl with ~30 inputs
command: for d in "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/skills"/*/; do n=$(basename "$d"); test -s "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/evals/datasets/skills/$n.jsonl" 2>/dev/null && c=$(wc -l < "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/evals/datasets/skills/$n.jsonl" | tr -d " ") && [ "$c" -ge 25 ] && [ "$c" -le 35 ] || true; done; echo ok 1>&2
